description_en: This is a tangible cultural property, a temple bell. It is town-designated by Ichinohe Town and was designated on 26 November 2004. It is held at the Goshono Jomon Museum.
This is a tangible cultural property, historical certificate documents. It is town-designated by Ichinohe Town and was designated on 26 March 1990. It is held at the Goshono Jomon Museum.

name_romaji: Yokohagi Byōtoji Okegawa Nimai Dō Gusoku
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property, a suit of riveted two-piece cuirass armor. It is town-designated by Ichinohe Town and was designated on 25 March 1985. It is in a private collection.

name_romaji: Hōei Rokunen Mei Shōmen Kongō Kōshin Kuyōtō

description_en: This is a tangible folk cultural property, a Koshin memorial tower bearing a Shomen Kongo image dated Hoei 6. It is town-designated by Ichinohe Town and was designated on 25 December 1984. It is located at Kitadate, Ichinohe.

description_en: This is a tangible folk cultural property, votive ema plaques. It is town-designated by Ichinohe Town and was designated on 25 March 1992. It is located at Saihoji, Saihoji and the Goshono Jomon Museum.

This is a municipally designated intangible folk cultural property, a rice-planting dance. It is designated by Takizawa City. It is located in the Osawa district of Takizawa City.

name_en: Kikuzuka Milestone Mound on the Kazuno Highway
description_en: This is a municipally designated historic site, an ichirizuka milestone mound on the Kazuno Highway. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 28 May 1981. It is located within the Sukogo area of Takizawa City.

name_en: Cedar and Katsura of Tamura Shrine
description_en: This is a municipally designated natural monument, a cedar and a katsura tree. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 1 March 1967. It is located at 12 Shinoki Kami-Shinoki, Takizawa City.

name_romaji: Tsunokake Jinja no Goryū no Fuji
description_en: This is a municipally designated natural monument, the five-dragon wisteria. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 2 October 1978. It is located at 34 Yubunezawa, Takizawa City.

name_romaji: Yamagami Jinja no Sugi Kuri Beniitaya
name_en: Cedar, Chestnut and Red Maple of Yamagami Shrine
description_en: This is a municipally designated natural monument, comprising a cedar, chestnut and red maple. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 18 April 1979. It is located at Ukai Ubayashiki 30-1 (within 3), Takizawa City.

name_romaji: Ōkamadate Iseki Nanagō Mizo Shutsudo Doki Jūkyū Ten
name_en: Nineteen Vessels Excavated from Ditch No. 7 at the Okamadate Site
description_en: This is a municipally designated tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, nineteen earthenware vessels. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 29 March 2010. It is held at the Takizawa City Buried Cultural Property Center, 327-13 Yubunezawa.

This is a municipally designated tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a footprint-impressed clay tablet. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 30 July 2013. It is held at the Takizawa City Buried Cultural Property Center, 327-13 Yubunezawa.

name_en: Deep Bowl with Human-Figure Design (One Piece)
description_en: This is a municipally designated tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a deep bowl with a human-figure design. It is designated by Takizawa City and was designated on 30 July 2013. It is held at the Takizawa City Buried Cultural Property Center, 327-13 Yubunezawa.
